title: Easyform update: Barcode Scanning and Get Current Location

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey monday users, we have two unique features recently released:

  1. Barcode scanning - Scan barcodes to look up connected board items, such as products in an inventory management board

  1. Get current location - allow the user to select their current location when filling location columns

If you have any questions please reach out to us by email at easyformsupport@easyappshq.com or by booking a call with us.
